notes: Level 7 manual review override shard for spell indexes 10-14 in generated discovery row order.
This packet added explicit utility options and runtime effects for Forcecage, Mirage Arcane, Mordenkainen's Magnificent Mansion, Plane Shift, and Power Word Pain.

forcecage::choice_or_mode.issue: The cage-versus-solid-box choice is represented by spatial forms and utility options.
forcecage::choice_or_mode.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.
forcecage::choice_or_mode.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by spatialDetails and UTILITY controlOptions.

forcecage::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: The Charisma save is only required when a trapped creature tries teleportation or interplanar travel; runtime has utility options but lacks conditional escape-save fields keyed to travel attempts.
forcecage::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: Add conditional escape-save fields for blocked travel effects.
forcecage::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime escapeSave or blockedTravelSave data.

forcecage::forced_movement.issue: Partial or too-large creatures being pushed out of the area is represented as a MOVEMENT push effect.

forcecage::vision_light_sound.issue: The prison is invisible; runtime preserves this in utility options, but lacks first-class invisibility/visibility fields for created force objects.

forcecage::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Teleportation, interplanar travel, and ethereal travel blocking are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class travel-blocking fields with save and wasted-effect outcomes.
forcecage::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: Add blocked travel mode fields with save outcomes.
forcecage::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime blockedTravel data for teleportation, interplanar travel, and ethereal travel.

forcecage::status_or_state_change.issue: Completely enclosed creatures are trapped, but runtime lacks a first-class trapped/passability state separate from generic utility options.
forcecage::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add trapped/passability state fields for prisons and barriers.

mirage-arcane::terrain_or_surface.issue: Difficult Terrain conversion and movement impedance are represented by TERRAIN and utility options.
mirage-arcane::terrain_or_surface.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain field required for this pass.
mirage-arcane::terrain_or_surface.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by TERRAIN effect and UTILITY controlOptions.

mirage-arcane::vision_light_sound.issue: Visual, audible, tactile, and olfactory illusion channels are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class multisensory illusion channel fields.

mirage-arcane::illusion_or_disguise.issue: The terrain illusion, Truesight exception, and continued physical interaction are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks typed illusion reveal/interaction fields.
mirage-arcane::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusion reveal and physical-interaction fields.
mirage-arcane::illusion_or_disguise.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime illusionReveal and illusionPhysicalInteraction data.

mirage-arcane::sensor_or_remote_percepti.issue: Truesight revealing the terrain's true form is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks a typed sense-gated reveal field.
mirage-arcane::sensor_or_remote_percepti.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime senseReveal data keyed to Truesight.

mirage-arcane::created_object_or_structu.issue: Altered or added structures are preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class illusory structure creation fields and creature exclusion fields.
mirage-arcane::created_object_or_structu.recommendedTemplateChange: Add illusory structure creation and creature exclusion fields.

mirage-arcane::environmental_change.issue: The spell can make terrain physically impede movement and remove illusory pieces when taken away; runtime lacks first-class terrain-state and removed-piece dissipation fields.
mirage-arcane::environmental_change.recommendedTemplateChange: Add physical illusion environmental state fields.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::choic.issue: Door operation, floor plan choice, furnishing choice, and servant appearance are represented as utility options.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::choic.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional choice field required for this pass.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::targe.issue: Only the caster and creatures designated when the spell is cast can enter; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks first-class entry eligibility fields.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::terra.issue: The 50 contiguous 10-foot Cube floor-plan limit is represented by targeting.maxTargets and spatial form data.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::terra.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional terrain/surface field required for this pass.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::illus.issue: The closed door is imperceptible and servants are near-transparent; runtime preserves these in utility options but lacks first-class visibility fields.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::illus.recommendedTemplateChange: Add visibility state fields for portals and created attendants.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::creat.issue: The extradimensional dwelling, floor-plan limit, furnishings, food, and door are represented by spatial details and utility options.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::creat.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional creation field required for this pass.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::creat.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by spatialDetails and UTILITY controlOptions.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::summo.issue: The 100 invulnerable servants are represented as SUMMONING plus utility options, but runtime lacks first-class noncombat-servant capability limits, invulnerability, and cannot-harm rules.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::summo.recommendedTemplateChange: Add noncombat servant capability and restriction fields.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::trave.issue: Entry into and expulsion from the extradimensional dwelling are represented by utility options and a MOVEMENT effect.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::trave.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::trave.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT and UTILITY effects.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::resou.issue: Food sufficient for a nine-course banquet for up to 100 people is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class created-food service capacity fields.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::envir.issue: Clean, fresh, warm atmosphere plus furnished/decorated dwelling are represented by utility options.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::envir.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional environmental field required for this pass.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::condi.issue: Expulsion of creatures and objects when the spell ends is represented by a MOVEMENT effect and utility option.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::condi.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional conditional-ending field required for this pass.

mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::after.issue: Removed furnishings dissipating into smoke and end-of-spell expulsion are represented by utility options and movement; no separate aftermath/memory mechanic remains hidden.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::after.recommendedTemplateChange: No aftermath field required for this pass.
mordenkainens-magnificent-mansion::after.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by UTILITY and MOVEMENT effects.

plane-shift::target_filter_or_eligibilit.issue: Up to eight willing creatures linking hands with the caster is represented by targeting.maxTargets and utility options.
plane-shift::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional target field required for this pass.
plane-shift::target_filter_or_eligibilit.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by targeting.maxTargets and UTILITY controlOptions.

plane-shift::travel_or_planar_movement.issue: Transport to another plane, general destination, and teleportation circle destination are represented by MOVEMENT and utility options.
plane-shift::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional travel field required for this pass.
plane-shift::travel_or_planar_movement.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT and UTILITY effects.

plane-shift::social_or_knowledge_effect.issue: Knowing a sigil sequence for a teleportation circle is preserved in utility options, but runtime lacks first-class destination-knowledge prerequisite fields.

plane-shift::environmental_change.issue: The too-small teleportation circle spillover is represented as a utility option and covered by the movement destination description.
plane-shift::environmental_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by MOVEMENT description and UTILITY controlOptions.

power-word-pain::attack_or_save_modifier.issue: Disadvantage on attack rolls is represented by ATTACK_ROLL_MODIFIER and utility options.
power-word-pain::attack_or_save_modifier.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional attack-roll field required for this pass.

power-word-pain::repeat_save_or_recurrin.closedReason: Power Word Pain now records the end-turn Constitution repeat save and the pre-cast Constitution gate as structured fields plus runtime repeatSave/recurringMechanics data.
power-word-pain::repeat_save_or_recurrin.issue: End-of-turn Constitution saves and pre-spellcasting Constitution saves are preserved in utility/status text, but runtime lacks first-class recurring save and pre-cast save gates.
power-word-pain::repeat_save_or_recurrin.recommendedTemplateChange: Add recurring save and pre-cast save gate fields.
power-word-pain::repeat_save_or_recurrin.recommendedJsonChange: Add runtime recurringSave and spellcastingGateSave data.

power-word-pain::vision_light_sound.issue: The detector matched ordinary visible-target wording; line-of-sight targeting is already represented.

power-word-pain::message_or_communicatio.issue: The spoken word of power is spellcasting flavor plus verbal component, not a message delivery mechanic.

power-word-pain::social_or_knowledge_eff.issue: Charm immunity excludes targets from the spell, but runtime lacks a first-class immunity-based eligibility field for this effect.

power-word-pain::object_stats_or_damagea.issue: The spell affects only targets with 100 hit points or fewer; runtime preserves this in utility options but lacks first-class HP-threshold eligibility fields.

power-word-pain::status_or_state_change.issue: Crippling pain is represented as a STATUS_CONDITION effect plus movement and attack-roll modifier effects.
power-word-pain::status_or_state_change.recommendedTemplateChange: No additional status field required for this pass.
power-word-pain::status_or_state_change.recommendedJsonChange: Closed by STATUS_CONDITION, MOVEMENT, ATTACK_ROLL_MODIFIER, and UTILITY effects.

power-word-pain::conditional_ending.issue: The pain ends on a successful end-of-turn Constitution save, but runtime currently stores that in status aftermath/utility options rather than a typed recurring end condition.
